description.zh-CN: 把 OpenCV 几何、匹配和区域类结构化结果包装成 value.v1，便于继续组合 JSON 响应或统一做 JSON 预览。
description.en-US: Wrap OpenCV geometry, matching, and region payloads as value.v1 so the result can be composed into JSON responses or previewed as JSON.
